items.title: The Washington Wizards and Felix Okpara have agreed to a two-way contract, league sources told HoopsHype. Okpara was the 46th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft and was an SEC All-Defensive Team selection. He was acquired by the Wizards from the Orlando Magic in a trade on draft night.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Washington Wizards and Felix Okpara have agreed to a two-way contract, league sources told HoopsHype. Okpara was the 46th pick in the 2026 NBA Draft and was an SEC All-Defensive Team selection. He was acquired by the Wizards from the Orlando Magic in a trade on draft night.

items.title: How does adding 2025-26 SEC All-Defensive team player Felix Okpara impact the Washington Wizards' roster and the Wizards' plans to add another big man this offseason? Will Washington be active in free agency? Story free to read in @TheAthleticNBA:
items.author: Josh Robbins
items.body_excerpt:
How does adding 2025-26 SEC All-Defensive team player Felix Okpara impact the Washington Wizards' roster and the Wizards' plans to add another big man this offseason? Will Washington be active in free agency? Story free to read in @TheAthleticNBA: 
www.nytimes.com/athletic/739...

media.title: Wizards add No. 46 pick Felix Okpara in second-round trade on draft’s final night (Gift Article)
media.description: The Wizards traded the 51st and 60th picks to the Magic to acquire Okpara's draft rights.
